### Criminal Alliance Mercenaries

These Mercenaries are acquired as Delegations via the Alliance Campaign Shop purchases.

#### 0-1 Cold Trader (Cost: 4 Glory)

Available via the Cold Traders Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Cold Trader | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+1 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Cold Trader is equipped with Standard Armour, a Sling Gun, two Blades, and a Displacer Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Sling Gun.** 24”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 on Critical Hit, TWO-HANDED  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL  
* **Displacer Field.** Attacks against the Cold Trader have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Abilities**

* **Bio-Booster.** The Cold Trader rolls twice on the Elite Trauma table, and you choose either result.  
* **Falsehood.** During the first Turn of each battle, the Cold Trader cannot be targeted by enemy attacks or abilities until the Cold Trader has made an attack orr targeted an enemy with an ability.  
* **Overseer.** As an Action with no Success Roll, the Chain Lord can designate one ally within 12” that it can see. The Chain Lord’s Activation immediately ends and that model’s Activation begins.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, SKIRMISHER, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Bosun (Cost: 2 Glory)

Available via the Cold Traders Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Bosun | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Bosun is equipped with Standard Armour, a Shotgun, and two Blades. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Shotgun.** 12”, \+1 DICE, SHOTGUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-2 Void-Born Scum (Cost: 1 Glory)

Available via the Cold Traders Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Void-Born Scum | 6”/Infantry | \-1 | \-1 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Void-Born Scum is equipped with an Autopistol and a Close Combat Weapon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Autopistol.** 12”, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Void-Born Scum is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Void-Born Scum instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Void-Born Scum.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-1 Rebel Lord (Cost: 4 Glory)

Available via the Fallen Houses Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Rebel Lord | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Rebel Lord is equipped with a Standard Armour, a Digital Laser, and the following options: a Bolt Pistol or a Needle Pistol, a Power Weapon or a Thunder Hammer (the Rebel Lord does not gain STRONG), and a Displacer Field or a Refractor Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Digital Laser.** 6”, PISTOL, takes no hands, can be used in addition to any other attacks the equipped model makes, but can be used only once per battle.  
* **Bolt Pistol.** 12”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Needle Pistol.** 12”, GAS, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Thunder Hammer.** Melee, \+2 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Displacer Field.** All attacks against the equipped model have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Refractor Field.** The equipped model treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

**Abilities**

* **Lord’s Skill.** The Rebel Lord begins with one Campaign Skill. Choose two of the available Skill Charts and roll 2D6 on each. Reroll results of 2 or 12\. The Rebel Lord has your choice of one of the rolled skills in addition to any it learns via XP.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Master Charlatan (Cost: 4 Glory)

Available via the Imperial Imposters Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Master Charlatan | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Master Charlatan is equipped with Standard Armour, a Needle Pistol, a Blade, Digital Laser Array, and a Diplacer Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Needle Pistol.** 12”, GAS, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL  
* **Digital Laser Array.** 6”, PISTOL, takes no hands, can be used in addition to any other attacks the equipped model makes.  
* **Displacer Field.** Attacks against the equipped model have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Abilities**

* **Falsehood.** During the first Turn of each battle, the Master Charlatan cannot be targeted by enemy attacks or abilities until the Master Charlatan  has made an attack orr targeted an enemy with an ability.  
* **Overseer.** As an Action with no Success Roll, the Chain Lord can designate one ally within 12” that it can see. The Chain Lord’s Activation immediately ends and that model’s Activation begins.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, INFILTRATOR, SKIRMISHER, TOUGH

#### 0-5 Narco Scum (Cost: 1 Glory)

Available via the Narco Lords Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Narco Scum | 6”/Infantry | \-1 | \-1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Narco Scum can be equipped with up to 20 credits worth of weapons, armour, or equipment from any Armoury you have access to. You do not have to pay for this equipment, and it does not count towards your Credit Limit, but it does count towards LIMITS for battlekit. You can change this equipment however you like between battles, but you cannot give it to any other model.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-1 Mind-Locked Wyrd (Cost: 4 Glory)

Available via the Psi-Syndica Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Mind-Locked Wyrd | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Mind-Locked Wyrd is equipped with Standard Armour and a Force Rod. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Force Rod.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC, HELD, MAIN HAND ONLY

The Mind-Locked Wyrd knows up to 30 credits worth of powers of your choice from the following list, to a maximum of five total powers, chosen when you recruit it. They are free and do not count towards your credit limit.

* **Assail (10 credits, Attack).** 12”, ASSAULT, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, PSYCHIC, SHRAPNEL, RISKY  
* **Bio Lightning (5 credits, Attack).** 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Cacophony of Silence (5 credits, Effect).** No Range, Self, Next Activation, the caster and any allies within 6” of it have the STEALTH Keyword.  
* **Craven Howl (5 credits, Effect).** \-1 DICE, 18”, One Down Enemy, Target Activation, the Target cannot stand up from Down.  
* **Crush (15 credits, Attack).** 24”, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Cyclopean Gaze (5 credits, Effect).** 18”, One Enemy, Special, if the target has not yet activated this Turn, it cannot be chosen to activate this Turn until D3 of its owner’s other models have been activated, or no models not under a similar effect are available.  
* **Flame Breath (20 credits, Attack).** 12”, AUTOMATIC 2, \-1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Opprobrious Curse (10 credits, Effect).** \-1 DICE, 3”, Each Enemy, each target must roll on the Injury table, with IGNORE ARMOUR.  
* **Penumbral Mirror (10 credits, Effect).** 12”, One Ally and One Enemy that are within 12” of one another, Immediate, remove the target ally from the battlefield then place it on the battlefield anywhere within 3” of the target enemy.  
* **Psychic Shriek (5 credits, Attack).** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
* **Puppet Master (10 credits, Effect).** \-1 DICE, 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D6” in the direction of your choice. This movement allows free attacks as if it were a Retreat Action. This power cannot be used while in close combat.  
* **Seen Unseen (5 credits, Effect).** 24”, One Enemy, Target Activation, the target counts as an “enemy model” to all of its allies, and it treats those allies as “enemy models.” This only affects what targets it can choose, which models its abilities affect, etc. For instance, it must Retreat in order to move away from its former allies, though they do not have to attack it if it does if they do not want to.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, GANGER, PSYKER 2, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Factoria Overseer (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the Rogue Factoria Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Factoria Overseer | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Factoria Overseer is equipped with Standard Armour, a Plasma Pistol, and a Shock Baton. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Plasma Pistol.** 12”, PISTOL, Scope  
  * Normal Shot: ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
  * Overload: \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, RISKY, roll on the injury table on a miss  
* **Shock Baton.** Melee, STUN

**Abilities**

* **Overseer.** As an Action with no Success Roll, the Factoria Overseer can designate one ally within 12” that it can see. The Factoria Overseer’s Activation immediately ends and that model’s Activation begins.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, TOUGH

Available via the Rogue Factoria Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Work Party Boss | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**

* **Laspistol.** 12”, PISTOL  
* **Shockwhip.** Melee, STUN, WHIP 3”

**Keywords**  
GANGER, LEADER

#### 0-3 Factoria Worker (Cost: 1 Glory)

Available via the Rogue Factoria Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Factoria Worker | 6”/Infantry | \-1 | \-1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Factoria Worker is equipped with your choice of an Autogun or an Autopistol, and a Close Combat Weapon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Autogun.** 24”, AUTOMATIC 2, \-1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, TWO-HANDED  
* **Autopistol.** 12”, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Factoria Worker is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Factoria Worker instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Factoria Worker.

**Keywords**  
GANGER
